title: Caramelized Sweet Potato Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir fry dish made with caramelized sweet potatoes, perfect for a quick dinner or snack.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the cubed sweet potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced carrot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in the tangy stir-fry sauce and stir to coat the vegetables.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped green onions and sesame seeds.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Serve hot garnished with additional green onions if desired.
